Localization.Description: Operation on an audit object in a database

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} disabled a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} modified a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} removed a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to disable a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} created a "{object.type}" object in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} created a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create a "{object.type}" object in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to modify a "{object.type}" object named "{object.name}" in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
